resources.string: The Play Store build uses normal Android wallet sign-in and keeps Seeker-only features in the Solana dApp Store build.
Your Ghola account unlocks call, email, chat, and owned agents. Turnkey-native signing is the target account surface for this build.
Your account unlocks the encrypted vault. Even Ghola can\'t read your chat.
Connect a compatible wallet to use Ghola chat, calls, email, agents, and private payments.
No compatible wallet installed. Install Solflare or Phantom, or use ghola.xyz for web account auth.
none detected - install Solflare or Phantom
Standard Android account proof is handled by wallet sign-in.
Runs local models on supported Android hardware when available. Nothing leaves the device.
